hero.title: Building a Better Society Together
hero.subtitle: ILF (Impact Life Foundation) is a non-political social organization dedicated to uplifting communities through education, healthcare, and sustainable development.

about.title: About ILF
about.subtitle: Who we are and why we exist

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To empower marginalized communities through sustainable social programs that foster education, health, economic growth, and human rights — creating lasting change from within communities.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: A just, equitable, and compassionate society where every individual has the opportunity to thrive with dignity and purpose, free from poverty and injustice.

overview.title: Organization Overview
overview.description: ILF (Impact Life Foundation) was established to serve as a bridge between donors and underserved communities. We operate through a nationwide network of dedicated volunteers across Bangladesh, running programs in education, health, poverty reduction, disaster relief, environment protection, and more.

why.title: Why ILF Exists
why.description: Millions of people across Bangladesh face extreme poverty, lack of education, and inadequate healthcare. ILF exists to be the change — mobilizing resources, raising awareness, and taking direct action to lift communities from despair to hope. We believe every life has immeasurable value.

values.title: Our Core Values
values.integrityDesc: We act with honesty and transparency in everything we do.
values.compassionDesc: We serve with empathy and genuine care for every person.
values.inclusionDesc: We welcome everyone regardless of background or belief.
values.impactDesc: We measure success by the real change we create.

activities.title: What We Do
activities.subtitle: Our programs span ten key areas of community development — reaching those who need it most.

education.title: Education Development
education.description: Helping poor students with books, scholarships, and free coaching to break the cycle of poverty through knowledge.

healthcare.title: Healthcare
healthcare.description: Free medical camps, blood donation drives, and health awareness campaigns for underserved communities across Bangladesh.

poverty.title: Poverty Reduction
poverty.description: Food distribution, job support, vocational training, and livelihood programs to uplift families from extreme poverty.

disaster.title: Disaster Management
disaster.description: Emergency relief and rehabilitation for victims of floods, cyclones, and other natural disasters with speed and care.

environment.title: Environment Protection
environment.description: Tree plantation drives and anti-plastic campaigns to protect our natural environment for future generations.

rights.title: Human Rights
rights.description: Advocating for women and children's rights and providing legal support and counseling to the vulnerable.

youth.title: Youth Development
youth.description: IT skills training, freelancing workshops, and leadership programs empowering young people to shape their futures.

culture.title: Cultural Activities
culture.description: Sports events, cultural programs, and community celebrations that foster unity and preserve heritage.

moral.title: Moral & Religious Education
moral.description: Promoting Islamic values, ethics, and character development to build a morally strong and harmonious community.

digital.title: Digital Awareness
digital.description: Cybersecurity awareness and digital literacy programs ensuring safe, productive internet usage for all ages.

gallery.title: Our Gallery
gallery.subtitle: Glimpses of our work — moments of impact captured across communities.

team.title: Meet Our Team
team.subtitle: Dedicated individuals working tirelessly for social change and community upliftment.

getInvolved.title: Get Involved
getInvolved.subtitle: Be part of the change — volunteer, donate, or partner with us to build a better Bangladesh.

volunteer.title: Volunteer With Us
volunteer.subtitle: Join our passionate network of volunteers and make a real difference on the ground.

donate.title: Support Our Cause
donate.subtitle: Your donation makes a real, measurable difference.
donate.description: Every contribution — big or small — helps us reach more lives. Your support funds education programs, medical camps, disaster relief, and community development initiatives across Bangladesh.
donate.contact: For bank transfer or large donations, please contact us directly at info@ilf-bd.org

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Have a question or want to collaborate? We'd love to hear from you.

footer.description: A non-political social organization dedicated to creating positive, lasting change in communities across Bangladesh.
